title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Bajaj Electricals - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Bajaj Electricals - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Bajaj Electricals are looking for an experienced Process Engineer based out of Aurangabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Bajaj Electricals:
Bajaj Electricals is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bajaj Electricals!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
